mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate exceeds 5.0% and remains elevated for 2+ consecutive months, the restrictive monetary stance increases real borrowing costs for corporations and consumers, compressing equity valuations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
regime_hint: monetary tightening cycle with restrictive rates
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20-day returns in > 65% of instances when FEDFUNDS > 5.0% for 2+ months, or Rank IC < 0.04 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in the unemployment rate of more than 0.4 percentage points over a 3-month period signals deteriorating labor market conditions and reduced consumer spending capacity, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
regime_hint: labor market deterioration or recession onset
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60-day returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite rising unemployment, or Rank IC < 0.05 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Month-over-month growth in retail sales (RSAFS) above 0.5% combined with housing starts (HOUST) above 1,300 thousand units indicates robust consumer demand and construction activity, signaling economic strength that drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS MoM growth > 0.5% AND HOUST > 1300k units
evidence_refs: fact:RSAFS at 709,668M and HOUST at 1,353k as of 2024-06-15
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20-day returns in > 55% of instances when both RSAFS and HOUST conditions are met, or Rank IC < 0.06 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production (INDPRO) declining month-over-month by more than 0.3% signals supply-side weakness and reduced manufacturing capacity utilization, which constrains corporate earnings growth and produces negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5-day returns in > 60% of instances when INDPRO declines > 0.3%, or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Payroll employment (PAYEMS) growth decelerating to below 100k new jobs per month while unemployment remains stable signals labor market softening without immediate crisis, producing mildly negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days as growth expectations moderate.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS MoM growth < 100k AND UNRATE stable (±0.1pp)
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20-day returns in > 65% of triggered instances, or Rank IC < 0.04 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Real GDP growth (GDPC1) measured quarter-over-quarter at an annualized rate above 2.5% indicates robust economic expansion that supports corporate earnings and equity valuations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
regime_hint: any regime with positive GDP growth
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 60-day returns in > 55% of periods when GDPC1 growth > 2.5% annualized, or Rank IC < 0.05 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: When CPI inflation (CPIAUCSL) year-over-year growth falls below 2.5% while the federal funds rate remains above 4.5%, the real interest rate becomes restrictively high, signaling monetary policy tightness that suppresses equity valuations and produces negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:CPIAUCSL at 313.534 and FEDFUNDS at 5.33% as of 2024-07-15
regime_hint: high real rates regime with disinflation
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20-day returns in > 60% of triggered instances, or Rank IC < 0.05 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production (INDPRO) growth accelerating to above 0.4% month-over-month combined with payroll employment (PAYEMS) growth above 150k per month signals robust supply-side expansion and labor market strength, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO MoM growth > 0.4% AND PAYEMS MoM growth > 150k
evidence_refs: fact:INDPRO at 102.8887 and PAYEMS at 158,723k as of 2024-07-15
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5-day returns in > 55% of triggered instances, or Rank IC < 0.04 over any 2-year rolling window.
